SELECT 
  "treatment",
  -"G" AS max_dissolution_rate,
  "OmegaAragonite"
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE ("treatment", -"G") IN (
  SELECT "treatment", MAX(-"G")
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  GROUP BY "treatment"
)

WITH unsealed_max AS (
  SELECT 
    "treatment",
    MAX(-"G") as max_neg_g
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "treatment" LIKE '%unsealed%'
  GROUP BY "treatment"
)
SELECT 
  MAX(CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%trossulus%' THEN max_neg_g END) / 
  MAX(CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%californianus%' THEN max_neg_g END) as factor
FROM unsealed_max

SELECT 
  "treatment",
  COUNT(*) AS number_of_shells,
  AVG(-"G") AS mean_dissolution_rate,
  STDDEV(-"G") AS stddev_dissolution_rate
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
GROUP BY "treatment"

SELECT 
  "treatment" AS species,
  AVG(CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%unsealed%' THEN -"G" END) - 
  AVG(CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%sealed%' THEN -"G" END) AS mean_dissolution_rate_difference
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
GROUP BY "treatment"
HAVING AVG(CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%unsealed%' THEN -"G" END) IS NOT NULL 
   AND AVG(CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%sealed%' THEN -"G" END) IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
  AVG(CASE WHEN "treatment" = 'M. californianus' THEN "shell.wt" END) / 
  AVG(CASE WHEN "treatment" = 'M. trossulus' THEN "shell.wt" END) AS weight_ratio
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"

SELECT 
  "treatment",
  REGR_SLOPE("G", "OmegaAragonite") AS slope,
  CORR("G", "OmegaAragonite") AS pearson_correlation
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
GROUP BY "treatment"

SELECT 
  "treatment",
  COUNT("shell.number") AS number_of_shells,
  AVG(-"G") AS mean_dissolution_rate
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
GROUP BY "treatment"

SELECT 
  "treatment",
  AVG("shell.wt") AS mean_shell_wt,
  STDDEV("shell.wt") AS stddev_shell_wt
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
GROUP BY "treatment"

SELECT 
  "treatment",
  AVG(-"G") AS mean_dissolution_rate,
  1.96 * STDDEV(-"G") / SQRT(COUNT(*)) AS ci_half_width
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
GROUP BY "treatment"

WITH unsealed_data AS (
  SELECT 
    -"G" as dissolution_rate,
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%trossulus%' THEN 'trossulus'
      WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%californianus%' THEN 'californianus'
    END as species
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
    AND "treatment" LIKE '%unsealed%'
),
stats AS (
  SELECT 
    species,
    AVG(dissolution_rate) as mean_dr,
    STDDEV_SAMP(dissolution_rate) as sd_dr,
    COUNT(*) as n
  FROM unsealed_data
  WHERE species IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY species
),
pooled_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN species = 'trossulus' THEN mean_dr END) as mean_trossulus,
    MAX(CASE WHEN species = 'californianus' THEN mean_dr END) as mean_californianus,
    MAX(CASE WHEN species = 'trossulus' THEN sd_dr END) as sd_trossulus,
    MAX(CASE WHEN species = 'californianus' THEN sd_dr END) as sd_californianus,
    MAX(CASE WHEN species = 'trossulus' THEN n END) as n_trossulus,
    MAX(CASE WHEN species = 'californianus' THEN n END) as n_californianus
  FROM stats
)
SELECT 
  (mean_trossulus - mean_californianus) / 
  SQRT(((n_trossulus - 1) * POWER(sd_trossulus, 2) + (n_californianus - 1) * POWER(sd_californianus, 2)) / 
       (n_trossulus + n_californianus - 2)) as cohens_d
FROM pooled_stats

WITH unsealed_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "treatment",
    -"G" AS dissolution_rate
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
    AND "treatment" IN ('unsealed M. trossulus', 'unsealed M. californianus')
),
group_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "treatment",
    COUNT(*) AS n,
    AVG(dissolution_rate) AS mean,
    VARIANCE(dissolution_rate) AS var
  FROM unsealed_data
  GROUP BY "treatment"
),
stats_combined AS (
  SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN "treatment" = 'unsealed M. trossulus' THEN mean END) AS mean1,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "treatment" = 'unsealed M. californianus' THEN mean END) AS mean2,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "treatment" = 'unsealed M. trossulus' THEN var END) AS var1,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "treatment" = 'unsealed M. californianus' THEN var END) AS var2,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "treatment" = 'unsealed M. trossulus' THEN n END) AS n1,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "treatment" = 'unsealed M. californianus' THEN n END) AS n2
  FROM group_stats
)
SELECT 
  (mean1 - mean2) / SQRT((var1 / n1) + (var2 / n2)) AS welch_t_statistic
FROM stats_combined

WITH filtered_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "treatment",
    -"G" AS dissolution_rate
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
),
stats AS (
  SELECT
    AVG(CASE WHEN "treatment" = 'unsealed' THEN dissolution_rate END) AS mean_unsealed,
    AVG(CASE WHEN "treatment" = 'sealed' THEN dissolution_rate END) AS mean_sealed,
    VAR_POP(CASE WHEN "treatment" = 'unsealed' THEN dissolution_rate END) AS var_unsealed,
    VAR_POP(CASE WHEN "treatment" = 'sealed' THEN dissolution_rate END) AS var_sealed,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN "treatment" = 'unsealed' THEN 1 END) AS n_unsealed,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN "treatment" = 'sealed' THEN 1 END) AS n_sealed
  FROM filtered_data
)
SELECT
  (mean_unsealed - mean_sealed) / SQRT((var_unsealed * n_unsealed + var_sealed * n_sealed) / (n_unsealed + n_sealed)) AS cohens_d
FROM stats

WITH dissolution_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "treatment",
    -"G" AS dissolution_rate
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
    AND "treatment" IN ('unsealed', 'sealed')
    AND "G" IS NOT NULL
),
group_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "treatment",
    AVG(dissolution_rate) AS mean_val,
    VARIANCE(dissolution_rate) AS var_val,
    COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM dissolution_data
  GROUP BY "treatment"
),
unsealed AS (
  SELECT mean_val, var_val, n FROM group_stats WHERE "treatment" = 'unsealed'
),
sealed AS (
  SELECT mean_val, var_val, n FROM group_stats WHERE "treatment" = 'sealed'
)
SELECT 
  (u.mean_val - s.mean_val) / SQRT((u.var_val / u.n) + (s.var_val / s.n)) AS welch_t_statistic
FROM unsealed u, sealed s

SELECT 
  "treatment",
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY -"G") AS median_dissolution_rate
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
GROUP BY "treatment"

SELECT 
  AVG(CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%trossulus%' AND "treatment" LIKE '%unsealed%' THEN -"G" END) / 
  NULLIF(AVG(CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%californianus%' AND "treatment" LIKE '%unsealed%' THEN -"G" END), 0) AS ratio
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1

SELECT 
  WIDTH_BUCKET("OmegaAragonite", 0, 10, 5) AS bin_number,
  0 + (WIDTH_BUCKET("OmegaAragonite", 0, 10, 5) - 1) * 2.0 AS bin_lower,
  0 + WIDTH_BUCKET("OmegaAragonite", 0, 10, 5) * 2.0 AS bin_upper,
  COUNT(*) AS incubation_count
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "OmegaAragonite" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY WIDTH_BUCKET("OmegaAragonite", 0, 10, 5)
ORDER BY bin_number

WITH dissolution_rate AS (
  SELECT 
    "shell.number",
    "treatment",
    -"G" / "duration" AS rate
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "G" IS NOT NULL AND "duration" IS NOT NULL AND "duration" > 0
),
treatment_stats AS (
  SELECT
    "treatment",
    AVG(rate) AS mean_rate,
    STDDEV(rate) AS sd_rate
  FROM dissolution_rate
  GROUP BY "treatment"
),
z_scores AS (
  SELECT
    dr."shell.number",
    dr."treatment",
    dr.rate,
    ts.mean_rate,
    ts.sd_rate,
    CASE 
      WHEN ts.sd_rate > 0 THEN (dr.rate - ts.mean_rate) / ts.sd_rate
      ELSE NULL
    END AS z_score
  FROM dissolution_rate dr
  JOIN treatment_stats ts ON dr."treatment" = ts."treatment"
)
SELECT 
  "shell.number",
  "treatment",
  rate,
  z_score
FROM z_scores
WHERE z_score IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY z_score DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
  "shell.number",
  "treatment",
  "OmegaAragonite",
  "G",
  AVG("G") OVER (ORDER BY "OmegaAragonite" ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS moving_avg_G
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "treatment" = 'unsealed'
ORDER BY "OmegaAragonite"

WITH dissolution_rate AS (
  SELECT 
    "shell.number",
    "treatment",
    "G",
    "duration",
    "shell.wt",
    "shell.length",
    -"G" AS dissolution_rate,
    PERCENT_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY "treatment" ORDER BY -"G") AS percentile_rank
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "G" IS NOT NULL AND "duration" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
  "shell.number",
  "treatment",
  "G",
  dissolution_rate,
  percentile_rank,
  "duration",
  "shell.wt",
  "shell.length"
FROM dissolution_rate
ORDER BY percentile_rank DESC
LIMIT 5

FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "treatment" LIKE '%unsealed%' 
  AND "shell.number" IN (
    SELECT "shell.number" 
    FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
    WHERE "treatment" LIKE '%M. trossulus%' OR "treatment" LIKE '%Mtrossulus%'
  )
  AND "G" > (
    SELECT MAX("G")
    FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
    WHERE "treatment" LIKE '%unsealed%'
      AND ("treatment" LIKE '%M. californianus%' OR "treatment" LIKE '%Mcalifornianus%')
  )

WITH filtered_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "treatment",
    -"G" AS dissolution_rate
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
),
group_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "treatment",
    COUNT(*) AS n,
    AVG(dissolution_rate) AS group_mean
  FROM filtered_data
  GROUP BY "treatment"
),
overall_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    AVG(dissolution_rate) AS grand_mean,
    COUNT(*) AS total_n,
    COUNT(DISTINCT "treatment") AS k
  FROM filtered_data
),
ss_between AS (
  SELECT 
    SUM(g.n * POWER(g.group_mean - o.grand_mean, 2)) AS ss_b,
    o.k - 1 AS df_between
  FROM group_stats g
  CROSS JOIN overall_stats o
  GROUP BY o.k
),
ss_within AS (
  SELECT 
    SUM(POWER(f.dissolution_rate - g.group_mean, 2)) AS ss_w,
    o.total_n - o.k AS df_within
  FROM filtered_data f
  JOIN group_stats g ON f."treatment" = g."treatment"
  CROSS JOIN overall_stats o
  GROUP BY o.total_n, o.k
)
SELECT 
  (b.ss_b / b.df_between) / (w.ss_w / w.df_within) AS f_statistic,
  b.df_between,
  w.df_within
FROM ss_between b
CROSS JOIN ss_within w

  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1 AND "G" < 0
),
design_matrix AS (
  SELECT
    log_dissolution_rate as y,
    "OmegaAragonite" as x,
    CASE WHEN species = 'trossulus' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END as species_dummy,
    CASE WHEN sealing = 'sealed' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END as sealing_dummy,
    CASE WHEN species = 'trossulus' AND sealing = 'sealed' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END as interaction
  FROM filtered_data
),
stats AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) as n,
    AVG(y) as y_mean,
    AVG(x) as x_mean,
    AVG(species_dummy) as s1_mean,
    AVG(sealing_dummy) as s2_mean,
    AVG(interaction) as int_mean
  FROM design_matrix
),
residuals AS (
  SELECT
    d.y - stats.y_mean as y_dev,
    d.x - stats.x_mean as x_dev,
    d.species_dummy - stats.s1_mean as s1_dev,

WITH filtered_data AS (

    "treatment",
    "G",
    "OmegaAragonite",
    "duration",
    "shell.wt",

regression_stats AS (

    SUM(log_dissolution) AS sum_y,
    SUM(species * log_dissolution) AS sum_species_y,
    SUM(sealing * log_dissolution) AS sum_sealing_y,
    SUM(species * sealing * log_dissolution) AS sum_interaction_y,
    SUM(species * species) AS sum_species_sq,
    SUM(sealing * sealing) AS sum_sealing_sq,
    SUM(species * sealing * species * sealing) AS sum_interaction_sq,
    SUM(species * sealing) AS sum_species_sealing,

  FROM filtered_data
)
SELECT

   sum_interaction_y * sum_species_sq * sum_sealing_sq * sum_interaction +

   sum_y * sum_species_sealing * sum_species_sealing_sq * sum_interaction) / 
  (n * sum_species_sq * sum_sealing_sq * sum_interaction_sq - 
   n * sum_species_sealing * sum_species_sealing * sum_sealing_sq - 
   sum_species_sq * sum_sealing * sum_sealing * sum_interaction_sq +

   sum_species * sum_species * sum_sealing_sq * sum_interaction_sq) AS coefficient_value
FROM regression_stats

  "Site",
  AVG("Survival") AS mean_survival_rate,
  COUNT(*) AS number_of_plots
FROM "2023_crop_data"
WHERE "Survival" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "Crop", "Site"
ORDER BY mean_survival_rate DESC
LIMIT 1

WITH site_crop_survival AS (
  SELECT 
    "Site",
    "Crop",
    AVG("Survival") as mean_survival
  FROM "2023_crop_data"
  WHERE "Crop" IN ('black pea', 'green pea')
  GROUP BY "Site", "Crop"
),
sites_with_both AS (
  SELECT "Site"
  FROM site_crop_survival
  GROUP BY "Site"
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT "Crop") = 2
),
comparison AS (
  SELECT 
    swb."Site",
    MAX(CASE WHEN scs."Crop" = 'black pea' THEN scs.mean_survival END) as black_pea_survival,
    MAX(CASE WHEN scs."Crop" = 'green pea' THEN scs.mean_survival END) as green_pea_survival
  FROM sites_with_both swb
  JOIN site_crop_survival scs ON swb."Site" = scs."Site"
  GROUP BY swb."Site"
)
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_sites,
  SUM(CASE WHEN black_pea_survival > green_pea_survival THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sites_black_exceeds_green
FROM comparison

WITH site_crop_survival AS (
  SELECT 
    "Site",
    "Crop",
    AVG("Survival") AS mean_survival

    AND "Average_height_80" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_height_90" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_height_100" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_height_110" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_height_120" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_height_130" IS NOT NULL
    AND "Average_height_140" IS NOT NULL
) AS plot_heights

WITH plot_max_heights AS (
  SELECT 
    "Plot_no",
    GREATEST(
      COALESCE("Average_height_50", 0),
      COALESCE("Average_height_60", 0),
      COALESCE("Average_height_70", 0),
      COALESCE("Average_height_80", 0),
      COALESCE("Average_height_90", 0),
      COALESCE("Average_height_100", 0),
      COALESCE("Average_height_110", 0),
      COALESCE("Average_height_120", 0),

  WHERE LOWER("Crop") LIKE '%black%pea%' OR LOWER("Crop") LIKE '%black pea%'
),
binned_plots AS (
  SELECT 
    CASE 
      WHEN max_height < 24 THEN '0-24'
      WHEN max_height < 48 THEN '24-48'
      WHEN max_height < 72 THEN '48-72'
      WHEN max_height < 96 THEN '72-96'
      WHEN max_height < 120 THEN '96-120'
      ELSE '120+'
    END AS bin,
    CASE 
      WHEN max_height < 24 THEN 1
      WHEN max_height < 48 THEN 2
      WHEN max_height < 72 THEN 3
      WHEN max_height < 96 THEN 4
      WHEN max_height < 120 THEN 5
      ELSE 6
    END AS bin_order
  FROM plot_max_heights
)
SELECT 
  bin,
  COUNT(*) AS plot_count
FROM binned_plots
GROUP BY bin, bin_order
HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
ORDER BY bin_order

WITH matrix_data AS (
  SELECT 
    row_number() OVER () as row_num,
    "col_1", "col_2", "col_3", "col_4", "col_5", "col_6", "col_7", "col_8", "col_9",
    "col_10", "col_11", "col_12", "col_13", "col_14", "col_15", "col_16", "col_17", "col_18"
  FROM "Pea_n18_NC_066583"
),
unpivoted AS (
  SELECT row_num, 1 as col_num, "col_1" as value FROM matrix_data
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 2, "col_2" FROM matrix_data
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 3, "col_3" FROM matrix_data
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 4, "col_4" FROM matrix_data
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 5, "col_5" FROM matrix_data
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 6, "col_6" FROM matrix_data
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 7, "col_7" FROM matrix_data
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 8, "col_8" FROM matrix_data
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 9, "col_9" FROM matrix_data
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 10, "col_10" FROM matrix_data
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 11, "col_11" FROM matrix_data
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 12, "col_12" FROM matrix_data
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 13, "col_13" FROM matrix_data
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 14, "col_14" FROM matrix_data
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 15, "col_15" FROM matrix_data
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 16, "col_16" FROM matrix_data
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 17, "col_17" FROM matrix_data
  UNION ALL SELECT row_num, 18, "col_18" FROM matrix_data
),
asymmetry AS (
  SELECT 
    a.row_num as i,
    a.col_num as j,
    ABS(a.value - b.value) as asymmetry_value
  FROM unpivoted a
  JOIN unpivoted b ON a.row_num = b.col_num AND a.col_num = b.row_num
  WHERE a.row_num < a.col_num
)
SELECT MAX(asymmetry_value) as max_asymmetry
FROM asymmetry

stats AS (
  SELECT
    MAX(CASE WHEN "breakthru" = 0 THEN mean_conc END) AS mean_0,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "breakthru" = 1 THEN mean_conc END) AS mean_1,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "breakthru" = 0 THEN var_conc END) AS var_0,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "breakthru" = 1 THEN var_conc END) AS var_1,

  WHERE e."breakthru" = 1
),
fatigue_by_group AS (
  SELECT 
    i."new_group",
    i."fatigue",
    COUNT(*) as observed
  FROM "inf_public" i
  INNER JOIN breakthrough_patients bp ON i."SUBJECT.ID." = bp."SUBJECT.ID."
  WHERE i."fatigue" IS NOT NULL
    AND i."new_group" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY i."new_group", i."fatigue"
),
marginals AS (
  SELECT 
    SUM(observed) as total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN "fatigue" = true THEN observed ELSE 0 END) as fatigue_total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN "fatigue" = false THEN observed ELSE 0 END) as no_fatigue_total
  FROM fatigue_by_group
),
group_totals AS (
  SELECT 
    "new_group",
    SUM(observed) as group_total
  FROM fatigue_by_group
  GROUP BY "new_group"
),
expected_values AS (
  SELECT 
    f."new_group",
    f."fatigue",
    f.observed,
    CASE 
      WHEN f."fatigue" = true THEN (g.group_total * m.fatigue_total::numeric / m.total)
      ELSE (g.group_total * m.no_fatigue_total::numeric / m.total)
    END as expected
  FROM fatigue_by_group f
  CROSS JOIN marginals m
  INNER JOIN group_totals g ON f."new_group" = g."new_group"
)
SELECT 
  SUM(POWER(observed - expected, 2) / expected) as chi_square_statistic
FROM expected_values

  WHERE "sex" = 'female' AND "size" IS NOT NULL
),
ranked_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "population",
    "size",
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY "size") as rank
  FROM female_data
),
group_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "population",
    COUNT(*) as n,
    SUM(rank) as sum_ranks
  FROM ranked_data
  GROUP BY "population"
),
total_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    COUNT(*) as total_n
  FROM ranked_data
)
SELECT 
  (12.0 / (total_n * (total_n + 1))) * 
  SUM((sum_ranks * sum_ranks) / n) - 
  3 * (total_n + 1) as kruskal_wallis_chi_square
FROM group_stats
CROSS JOIN total_stats

WITH male_body_length AS (
  SELECT 
    "population",
    "size"
  FROM "raw_body_length"
  WHERE "sex" = 'male' AND "size" IS NOT NULL
),
ranked_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "population",
    "size",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "size") as rank
  FROM male_body_length
),
population_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "population",
    COUNT(*) as n,
    SUM(rank) as sum_ranks
  FROM ranked_data
  GROUP BY "population"
),
total_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    COUNT(*) as N,
    SUM(rank * (rank + 1)) / 2.0 as sum_all_ranks
  FROM ranked_data
)
SELECT 
  (12.0 / (N * (N + 1))) * SUM(POWER(sum_ranks, 2) / n) - 3 * (N + 1) as kruskal_wallis_chi_square
FROM population_stats, total_stats
GROUP BY N

WITH contingency AS (
  SELECT 
    "stimulus",
    "call01",
    COUNT(*) as observed
  FROM "env_0_1_fixed"
  WHERE "stimulus" IS NOT NULL AND "call01" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "stimulus", "call01"
),
marginals AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(observed) as total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN "call01" = 0 THEN observed ELSE 0 END) as call_0_total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN "call01" = 1 THEN observed ELSE 0 END) as call_1_total
  FROM contingency
),
stimulus_totals AS (
  SELECT
    "stimulus",
    SUM(observed) as stim_total
  FROM contingency
  GROUP BY "stimulus"
),
expected AS (
  SELECT
    c."stimulus",
    c."call01",
    c.observed,
    (st.stim_total::numeric * 
     CASE WHEN c."call01" = 0 THEN m.call_0_total ELSE m.call_1_total END::numeric / 
     m.total::numeric) as expected
  FROM contingency c
  CROSS JOIN marginals m
  JOIN stimulus_totals st ON c."stimulus" = st."stimulus"
)
SELECT
  SUM(POWER(observed - expected, 2) / expected) as chi_square_statistic
FROM expected

WITH ranked_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    "Perch height (cm)",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "Perch height (cm)", "sex") as rank
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "sex" IN ('male', 'female') 
    AND "Perch height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
    AND "plot" IS NOT NULL
),
group_stats AS (
  SELECT
    "sex",
    COUNT(*) as n,
    SUM(rank) as rank_sum
  FROM ranked_data
  GROUP BY "sex"
),
mann_whitney AS (
  SELECT
    (SELECT n FROM group_stats WHERE "sex" = 'female') as n_female,
    (SELECT n FROM group_stats WHERE "sex" = 'male') as n_male,
    (SELECT rank_sum FROM group_stats WHERE "sex" = 'female') as rank_sum_female,
    (SELECT rank_sum FROM group_stats WHERE "sex" = 'male') as rank_sum_male
)
SELECT
  n_female,
  n_male,
  (rank_sum_female - (n_female * (n_female + n_male + 1.0) / 2.0) - (n_female * n_male / 2.0)) / 
  SQRT(n_female * n_male * (n_female + n_male + 1.0) / 12.0) as z_statistic
FROM mann_whitney

WITH filtered_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    "Perch height (cm)"
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "age" = 'adult' 
    AND "sex" IN ('male', 'female')
    AND "plot" = 'used'
    AND "Perch height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
),
ranked_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    "Perch height (cm)",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "Perch height (cm)", "sex") as rank
  FROM filtered_data
),
group_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    COUNT(*) as n,
    SUM(rank) as rank_sum
  FROM ranked_data
  GROUP BY "sex"
),
mann_whitney AS (
  SELECT 
    m.n as male_n,
    f.n as female_n,
    m.rank_sum as male_rank_sum,
    f.rank_sum as female_rank_sum,
    m.n * f.n as n_product,
    m.n * f.n / 2.0 as u_mean,
    SQRT(m.n * f.n * (m.n + f.n + 1) / 12.0) as u_sd,
    m.rank_sum - (m.n * (m.n + 1) / 2.0) as u_male
  FROM 
    (SELECT n, rank_sum FROM group_stats WHERE "sex" = 'male') m
  CROSS JOIN
    (SELECT n, rank_sum FROM group_stats WHERE "sex" = 'female') f
)
SELECT 
  male_n,
  female_n,
  (u_male - u_mean) / NULLIF(u_sd, 0) as mann_whitney_z
FROM mann_whitney

WITH filtered_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    "Vegetation density"
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "age" = 'adult'
    AND "sex" IN ('male', 'female')
    AND "plot" = 'used'
    AND "Vegetation density" IS NOT NULL
),
contingency AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    "Vegetation density",
    COUNT(*) as observed
  FROM filtered_data
  GROUP BY "sex", "Vegetation density"
),
row_totals AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    SUM(observed) as row_total
  FROM contingency
  GROUP BY "sex"
),
col_totals AS (
  SELECT 
    "Vegetation density",
    SUM(observed) as col_total
  FROM contingency
  GROUP BY "Vegetation density"
),
grand_total AS (
  SELECT SUM(observed) as total
  FROM contingency
),
expected_values AS (
  SELECT 
    c."sex",
    c."Vegetation density",
    c.observed,
    (r.row_total * col.col_total * 1.0 / g.total) as expected
  FROM contingency c
  JOIN row_totals r ON c."sex" = r."sex"
  JOIN col_totals col ON c."Vegetation density" = col."Vegetation density"
  CROSS JOIN grand_total g
)
SELECT 
  SUM(POWER(observed - expected, 2) / expected) as chi_square_statistic
FROM expected_values

WITH juvenile_used AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    "Vegetation type"
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "age" = 'juvenile'
    AND "plot" = 'used'
    AND "sex" IN ('male', 'female')
    AND "Vegetation type" IS NOT NULL
),
contingency AS (
  SELECT 
    "Vegetation type",
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'male') AS male_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'female') AS female_count,
    COUNT(*) AS total_veg
  FROM juvenile_used
  GROUP BY "Vegetation type"
),
totals AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(male_count) AS total_male,
    SUM(female_count) AS total_female,
    SUM(total_veg) AS grand_total
  FROM contingency
),
expected_and_chi AS (
  SELECT
    c."Vegetation type",
    c.male_count AS observed_male,
    c.female_count AS observed_female,
    (c.total_veg * t.total_male::double precision / t.grand_total) AS expected_male,
    (c.total_veg * t.total_female::double precision / t.grand_total) AS expected_female
  FROM contingency c
  CROSS JOIN totals t
)
SELECT
  SUM(
    POWER(observed_male - expected_male, 2) / NULLIF(expected_male, 0) +
    POWER(observed_female - expected_female, 2) / NULLIF(expected_female, 0)
  ) AS chi_square_statistic
FROM expected_and_chi

WITH filtered_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "age",
    "Distance from nearest water (m)" AS distance
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "plot" = 'used' 
    AND "age" IN ('adult', 'juvenile')
    AND "Distance from nearest water (m)" IS NOT NULL
),
ranked_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "age",
    distance,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY distance) AS rank
  FROM filtered_data
),
group_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "age",
    COUNT(*) AS n,
    SUM(rank) AS rank_sum
  FROM ranked_data
  GROUP BY "age"
),
mann_whitney AS (
  SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN "age" = 'adult' THEN n END) AS n1,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "age" = 'juvenile' THEN n END) AS n2,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "age" = 'adult' THEN rank_sum END) AS r1,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "age" = 'juvenile' THEN rank_sum END) AS r2
  FROM group_stats
)
SELECT 
  n1 AS adult_sample_size,
  n2 AS juvenile_sample_size,
  (LEAST(
    r1 - n1 * (n1 + 1.0) / 2.0,
    r2 - n2 * (n2 + 1.0) / 2.0
  ) - n1 * n2 / 2.0) / SQRT(n1 * n2 * (n1 + n2 + 1.0) / 12.0) AS mann_whitney_z
FROM mann_whitney
WHERE n1 > 0 AND n2 > 0

SELECT 
  "age",
  "sex",
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Perch height (cm)") AS median_perch_height

WHERE "plot" = 'used'

WITH filtered_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "age",
    "Tree height (cm)"
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "plot" = 'used'
    AND "age" IN ('adult', 'juvenile')
    AND "Tree height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
),
group_stats AS (
  SELECT
    "age",
    AVG("Tree height (cm)") as mean_height,
    STDDEV_SAMP("Tree height (cm)") as sd_height,
    COUNT(*) as n
  FROM filtered_data
  GROUP BY "age"
),
adult_stats AS (
  SELECT mean_height, sd_height, n
  FROM group_stats
  WHERE "age" = 'adult'
),
juvenile_stats AS (
  SELECT mean_height, sd_height, n
  FROM group_stats
  WHERE "age" = 'juvenile'
)
SELECT
  a.mean_height as adult_mean,
  j.mean_height as juvenile_mean,
  (a.mean_height - j.mean_height) / 
    SQRT(((a.n - 1) * POWER(a.sd_height, 2) + (j.n - 1) * POWER(j.sd_height, 2)) / (a.n + j.n - 2)) as cohens_d,
  (a.mean_height - j.mean_height) / 
    SQRT(POWER(a.sd_height, 2) / a.n + POWER(j.sd_height, 2) / j.n) as welch_t_statistic
FROM adult_stats a
CROSS JOIN juvenile_stats j

SELECT 
  "sex",

  AVG("Light intensity (Lux)") AS mean_light_intensity

WITH juvenile_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex",
    "Rock height (cm)"
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "age" = 'juvenile' 
    AND "plot" = 'used'
    AND "Rock height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
),
male_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Rock height (cm)") AS median,
    AVG("Rock height (cm)") AS mean,
    STDDEV_POP("Rock height (cm)") AS stddev,
    COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM juvenile_data
  WHERE "sex" = 'male'
),
female_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Rock height (cm)") AS median,
    AVG("Rock height (cm)") AS mean,
    STDDEV_POP("Rock height (cm)") AS stddev,
    COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM juvenile_data
  WHERE "sex" = 'female'
),
pooled_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    SQRT(((m.n - 1) * POWER(m.stddev, 2) + (f.n - 1) * POWER(f.stddev, 2)) / (m.n + f.n - 2)) AS pooled_stddev
  FROM male_stats m, female_stats f
)
SELECT 
  m.median AS male_median,
  f.median AS female_median,
  (m.mean - f.mean) / p.pooled_stddev AS cohens_d
FROM male_stats m, female_stats f, pooled_stats p

SELECT 
  "Vegetation type",
  COUNT(CASE WHEN "Individual number" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS used_count,
  COUNT(*) AS available_count,
  CASE 
    WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN

  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Individual number" IS NOT NULL AND "sex" = 'male' AND "age" = 'adult') AS used_count,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Individual number" IS NULL) AS available_count,
  CASE 
    WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Individual number" IS NULL) > 0 
    THEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Individual number" IS NOT NULL AND "sex" = 'male' AND "age" = 'adult')::double precision / 
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Individual number" IS NULL)::double precision
    ELSE NULL

SELECT 
  CORR("Rock height (cm)", "Rock size (cm)") AS correlation_all_plots,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Rock height (cm)" IS NOT NULL AND "Rock size (cm)" IS NOT NULL) AS n_complete_pairs_all_plots,
  CORR("Rock height (cm)", "Rock size (cm)") FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'used') AS correlation_used_plots,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Rock height (cm)" IS NOT NULL AND "Rock size (cm)" IS NOT NULL AND "plot" = 'used') AS n_complete_pairs_used_plots
FROM "Sheet2"

WITH regression_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "Tree height (cm)" as x,
    "Perch height (cm)" as y
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "Tree height (cm)" IS NOT NULL 
    AND "Perch height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
),
stats AS (
  SELECT
    regr_slope(y, x) as slope,
    regr_intercept(y, x) as intercept,
    regr_r2(y, x) as r_squared,
    corr(y, x) as pearson_correlation
  FROM regression_data
)
SELECT 
  slope,
  intercept,
  r_squared,
  pearson_correlation
FROM stats

WITH plot_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "plot",
    AVG("Tree height (cm)") AS mean_height,
    STDDEV_SAMP("Tree height (cm)") AS sd_height,
    COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "plot" IN ('used', 'random') 
    AND "Tree height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "plot"
),
cohens_d_calc AS (
  SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'used' THEN mean_height END) AS used_mean,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'random' THEN mean_height END) AS random_mean,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'used' THEN sd_height END) AS used_sd,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'random' THEN sd_height END) AS random_sd,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'used' THEN n END) AS used_n,
    MAX(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'random' THEN n END) AS random_n
  FROM plot_stats
)
SELECT 
  used_mean,
  random_mean,
  (used_mean - random_mean) / 
    SQRT(((used_n - 1) * POWER(used_sd, 2) + (random_n - 1) * POWER(random_sd, 2)) / 
         (used_n + random_n - 2)) AS cohens_d
FROM cohens_d_calc

SELECT 
  (SUM(POWER("Perch height (cm)" - avg_val, 3)) / COUNT(*)) / POWER(STDDEV_POP("Perch height (cm)"), 3) AS skewness,
  (SUM(POWER("Perch height (cm)" - avg_val, 4)) / COUNT(*)) / POWER(STDDEV_POP("Perch height (cm)"), 4) - 3 AS excess_kurtosis
FROM "Sheet2"
CROSS JOIN (SELECT AVG("Perch height (cm)") AS avg_val FROM "Sheet2" WHERE "Perch height (cm)" IS NOT NULL) AS avg_table
WHERE "Perch height (cm)" IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'experimental') AS experimental_plots,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'random') AS random_plots
FROM "Sheet2"

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS observations,
  COUNT(DISTINCT "Individual number") AS distinct_individuals,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Individual number" IN (
    SELECT "Individual number" 
    FROM "Sheet2" 
    WHERE "Individual number" IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY "Individual number" 
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
  )) AS recaptures
FROM "Sheet2"

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Distance from nearest water (m)" IS NULL) AS missing_distance_water,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Distance from nearest road (m)" IS NULL) AS missing_distance_road,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Light intensity (Lux)" IS NULL) AS missing_light_intensity,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Rock height (cm)" IS NULL) AS missing_rock_height,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Rock size (cm)" IS NULL) AS missing_rock_size
FROM "Sheet2"

SELECT 
  "Vegetation type",
  "Vegetation coverage",
  "Vegetation density",
  "Substrate status",
  COUNT(*) as row_count
FROM "Sheet2"
GROUP BY 
  "Vegetation type",
  "Vegetation coverage",
  "Vegetation density",
  "Substrate status"
ORDER BY row_count DESC

SELECT 
  "sex",
  "age",
  COUNT(DISTINCT "plot") AS plot_count
FROM "Sheet2"
GROUP BY "sex", "age"

SELECT 'strong' AS parasite_type, 'juvenile' AS life_stage, COUNT(*) AS record_count FROM "strong_df"
UNION ALL
SELECT 'strong' AS parasite_type, 'adult' AS life_stage, COUNT(*) AS record_count FROM "adult_strong_df"
UNION ALL
SELECT 'fluke' AS parasite_type, 'juvenile' AS life_stage, COUNT(*) AS record_count FROM "fluke_df"
UNION ALL
SELECT 'fluke' AS parasite_type, 'adult' AS life_stage, COUNT(*) AS record_count FROM "adult_fluke_df"
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ecg' AS parasite_type, 'juvenile' AS life_stage, COUNT(*) AS record_count FROM "ecg_df"
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ecg' AS parasite_type, 'adult' AS life_stage, COUNT(*) AS record_count FROM "adult_ecg_df"
ORDER BY parasite_type, life_stage

SELECT 
  "MumCode",
  AVG("lEPG") AS mean_burden,
  COUNT(*) AS sample_size,
  RANK() OVER (ORDER BY AVG("lEPG") DESC) AS rank
FROM "strong_df"
WHERE "MumCode" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "MumCode"
ORDER BY mean_burden DESC
LIMIT 5

WITH yearly_survival AS (
  SELECT 
    "Year",
    AVG("Survived.mod") AS survival_rate,
    COUNT(*) AS sample_size
  FROM "strong_df"
  WHERE "Season" = 'Winter' OR "AgeCat" = 'Juvenile'
  GROUP BY "Year"
)
SELECT 
  "Year",
  survival_rate,
  sample_size,
  AVG(survival_rate) OVER (
    ORDER BY "Year" 
    ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
  ) AS three_year_moving_avg
FROM yearly_survival
ORDER BY "Year"

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM "strong_df" s
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 
  FROM "fluke_df" f 
  WHERE f."Name" = s."Name" 
    AND f."Year" = s."Year" 
    AND f."Season" = s."Season"
)

SELECT *
FROM "strong_df"
WHERE "Season" NOT IN ('Autumn', 'Spring', 'Summer')
  AND "Season" IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 1

SELECT 
  "Survived.mod",
  AVG("lEPG") AS mean_burden,
  COUNT(*) AS sample_size
FROM "strong_df"
WHERE "lEPG" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "Survived.mod"
ORDER BY "Survived.mod"

SELECT 
  MIN("FROH") AS min_inbreeding,
  MAX("FROH") AS max_inbreeding,
  MIN("lEPG") AS min_burden,
  MAX("lEPG") AS max_burden
FROM "adult_strong_df"

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "Name") AS distinct_deer_count
FROM (
  SELECT "Name" FROM "strong_df"
  UNION
  SELECT "Name" FROM "fluke_df"
  UNION
  SELECT "Name" FROM "ecg_df"
  UNION
  SELECT "Name" FROM "adult_fluke_df"
  UNION
  SELECT "Name" FROM "adult_strong_df"
) AS combined_datasets

WITH matched_samples AS (
  SELECT 
    s."lEPG" AS strong_lEPG,
    f."lEPG" AS fluke_lEPG,
    e."lEPG" AS ecg_lEPG
  FROM "strong_df" s
  INNER JOIN "fluke_df" f ON s."Name" = f."Name" AND s."Year" = f."Year"
  INNER JOIN "ecg_df" e ON s."Name" = e."Name" AND s."Year" = e."Year"
  WHERE s."lEPG" IS NOT NULL 
    AND f."lEPG" IS NOT NULL 
    AND e."lEPG" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
  'strong vs fluke' AS parasite_pair,
  CORR(strong_lEPG, fluke_lEPG) AS pearson_correlation,
  COUNT(*) AS sample_size
FROM matched_samples
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'strong vs ecg' AS parasite_pair,
  CORR(strong_lEPG, ecg_lEPG) AS pearson_correlation,
  COUNT(*) AS sample_size
FROM matched_samples
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'fluke vs ecg' AS parasite_pair,
  CORR(fluke_lEPG, ecg_lEPG) AS pearson_correlation,
  COUNT(*) AS sample_size
FROM matched_samples

SELECT *
FROM "adult_strong_df"
WHERE "Survived.mod" IS NOT NULL 
  AND "Survived.mod" NOT IN (0, 1)

SELECT MIN("Year") AS earliest_year, MAX("Year") AS latest_year
FROM "fluke_df"

SELECT 
  "AgeCat",
  COUNT(*) AS sample_size,
  CORR("lEPG", "FROH") AS pearson_correlation,
  REGR_SLOPE("lEPG", "FROH") AS regression_slope
FROM "strong_df"
WHERE "AgeCat" IN ('Calf', 'Yearling')
  AND "lEPG" IS NOT NULL 
  AND "FROH" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "AgeCat"

SELECT 
  WIDTH_BUCKET("FROH", -2, 9, 5) AS bin,
  COUNT(*) AS count
FROM "adult_fluke_df"
WHERE "FROH" IS NOT NULL AND "FROH" >= -2 AND "FROH" <= 9
GROUP BY bin
ORDER BY bin
